THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHI: A shield-bearer from another saga. Your walls will be tested here, Demi-Servant.
Climb, then. Even a castle of the distant utopia can be built one floor at a time.
That shield of yours... older than this Spire, and stubborner still.
Raise your shield all you like. The Spire strikes from within.
